items.claim: Manel Kape possesses higher-than-average punching power.
items.quote: Manel Cape hits harder than most people, guys.

items.claim: Brandon Royval maintains a high output of strikes throughout his fights.
items.quote: He's going to be output, output, output, guys.

items.claim: Lona Kavnov is not a fighter who prefers to grapple.
items.quote: Lona's not even someone who likes to grapple much

items.claim: Lona Kavnov leaves his chin exposed more often than Joshua Van.
items.quote: He's a lesser version with his chin on the platter more.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen is a more intelligent fighter than Mario Bautista.
Cory Sandhagen is effective at stuffing predictable takedowns.
items.quote: if you come in with predictable takedowns, he'll stuff him.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen is difficult to strike with due to his low kicks and movement.
items.quote: Cory's a tricky one to strike with, guys. To get a flow against Cory is tricky cuz the guy is He's pretty damn good with those low kicks and that movement.
